title: johnsonia teretifolia
intro: Johnsonia teretifolia, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid found in Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally, Johnsonia teretifolia has been used in herbal medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenes. The medicinal properties of Johnsonia teretifolia have been reported to provide various health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Johnsonia teretifolia can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
